scripts.build:wasm: cd rust && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && if not exist ..\wasm mkdir ..\wasm && copy target\wasm32-unknown-unknown\release\dasp_crypto.wasm ..\wasm\dasp_crypto.wasm
scripts.build:c: cd c && "C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin\clang.exe" -O3 -o d-spna-512.exe main.c spna_engine.c gf_math.c ml_kem.c fips202.c sha512.c sha256.c rng.c poly.c poly_sampling.c -I. -lws2_32 -luserenv -ladvapi32 -lbcrypt -mavx2 -mavx512f -fno-strict-aliasing
scripts.build:engines: npm run build:rust && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:c && npm run build:cuda
scripts.lint:c: cd c && "C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin\clang.exe" -fsyntax-only -Wall -Wextra -D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS -D_CRT_NONSTDC_NO_DEPRECATE main.c spna_engine.c gf_math.c ml_kem.c fips202.c sha512.c sha256.c rng.c poly.c poly_sampling.c -I.
scripts.lint:engines: npm run lint:rust && npm run lint:c
